text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Please, Assistant Trainer! Can't you go any faster?!
A raucous crowd tightly packs the Nakayama Racecourse stands.

Mejiro McQueen and I squeeze our way through scores of cheering 
fans as we head to the front.

Mejiro McQueen and I squeeze our way through scores of cheering 
fans as we head to the front.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I would never be able to forgive myself if I were to miss Oguri's big 
finish!
In that case, shouldn't we have just kept watching from the staff box?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As I said, I need to see her dazzling figure in this important race up 
close!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: The other runners close in, but Oguri maintains the lead! Oguri leads!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh no, they're about to cross the finish! Come, take my hand!

Mejiro McQueen clasps my hand with an emphatic grip and pulls me 
through the crowd.

Mejiro McQueen clasps my hand with an emphatic grip and pulls me 
through the crowd.

A final tug from McQueen and in that instant, the spectacle opens 
before us.

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Oguri keeps her lead for a brilliant finish! Oguri places first! Oguri 
wins!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Superstar horsegirl Oguri Cap has done it! A miracle win in the last 
race of the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Woooow!

I'll never forget the marvel, the miracle, that unfolded in front of my 
eyes today.

I'll never forget the marvel, the miracle, that unfolded in front of my 
eyes today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Amazing… Just stunning! She really won!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So this is what it means to be the team's ace…

And to think she's been slumping lately. People even started saying 
she was done for when she placed 11th in her last race…

text_block_list.name: Retiring Trainer
text_block_list.text:
When we heard folks spoutin' that nonsense, we both knew we had to 
prove 'em wrong!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah, there you are. Congratulations, Trainer.

Our team's chief trainer approaches us. This man has taught me 
everything I know about being a trainer.

Our team's chief trainer approaches us. This man has taught me 
everything I know about being a trainer.

A veteran of thirty years, he's decided to make this his last race. 
However…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Especially after you and Oguri put on such a spectacular 
race…
Oguri! Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Today's Oguri Chant is shaking the stands to their very core! What an 
echo!
A crowd surpassing 100 000 chant the superstar's name.

They sing of the perfect job my mentor did preparing her for this 
race.
It's all the proof I need to know that he still has so much yet to give…

text_block_list.name: Retiring Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Nah, that's it for me, I'm afraid. After the long road here, this tank's 
on empty.

text_block_list.name: Retiring Trainer
text_block_list.text: So the plan's not changing. Team Sirius is in your hands now!
Smack!
And so I'm pushed on, with a vigorous clap on the shoulder.
And so I'm pushed on, with a vigorous clap on the back.

Everything I know, I learned during my two years as an assistant 
trainer for Team Sirius.

I'm about to lose my guiding light — one that was always there in times 
of weakness.

text_block_list.name: Retiring Trainer
text_block_list.text:
You do McQueen right, you hear? She's hitting her prime with that 
Kikuka Sho win!

text_block_list.name: Retiring Trainer
text_block_list.text: Give it your all, and I know you two will end up defining G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Indeed. You've been a tad unreliable as an assistant trainer, though, so I'll have to be the one supporting you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Perhaps you'll straighten up once I win the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Do look forward to it, will you?

text_block_list.name: Retiring Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Haha! She's already got you right around her finger! But you know, I 
really do expect great things.

text_block_list.name: Retiring Trainer
text_block_list.text: I can't wait to see where you take my dear Team Sirius!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Of course!
And so, a deep crimson falls upon the turf of Nakayama Racecourse.
And so, a deep crimson falls upon the turf of Nakayama Racecourse.
